footer_powered_by: Powered by Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
upload_subtitle: anaasɛ click sɛ hwɛ / fa kamera
select_prompt: Yi nea ɛte sɛ wo nnua no paa
select_subtitle: Kari kaad bi na yi, afei di adi
result_treatment_sub: Di sa akwan yi ma wo nnua no
result_prevention_sub: Di mmara yi ma wo nnua no apɔmu
result_healthy_msg: Nkonimdi! Wo nnua no da ho sɛ apɔmu.
result_healthy_sub: Di mmara yi na bɛto wo ho sɛ ɛbɛkɔ so.
result_at_risk_msg: Wo nnua no nnya yare da nanso ɛda adanse a ɛdi kan.
result_at_risk_sub: Yɛ dwuma seisei na siw yare fi ase.
result_infected_msg: Wohuu yare wɔ wo nnua no so.
result_infected_sub: Di ayaresa dwumadie a ɛwɔ ase yi ntɛmntɛm.
result_export_footer: Powered by AgroSense — Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
error_scan_failed: Nhwɛso no a ɛnni ade. Sɔ bio.
error_unexpected_response: Server returned an unexpected response. Check Django logs.
error_network_prod_cross_origin: Cannot reach the API (wrong URL, CORS, or backend waking/sleeping on Render). Confirm VITE_API_BASE_URL has no typo; on Render set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to this site's exact https origin (and preview URLs if you use them). Retry after 30-60s on cold start.
error_network_prod_same_origin: Cannot reach the API. Same-origin /api should proxy via repo-root vercel.json. Update the rewrite destination to your Render URL, redeploy Vercel, or set VITE_API_BASE_URL to that URL and redeploy.
error_network_dev: Cannot reach the API. Local dev: (1) In backend: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 (2) In frontend: npm run dev. Leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty in frontend/.env so /api proxies to Django.
error_file_type: Fa jpg, png, anaasɛ webp fɔto.
error_no_results: Wonhu nnua biara. Sɔ fɔto a ɛhyerɛn bio.
history_empty: No scans yet. Scan your first plant!
history_empty_sub: Your past diagnoses will appear here.
history_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all scan history?
settings_built_with: Built with Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
lab_precision_body: Our models are trained on over 500,000 verified pathological samples of regional crops.
expert_insights_body: Receive instant organic treatment recommendations and preventative strategies.
camera_error_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions and try again.
rightpanel_home_title: Hu amambɔ a ɛwɔ nnua ho
rightpanel_home_desc: Fa dwene biara a ɛwɔ nnua ho no si so na nya AI adwene a ɛyɛ papa wɔ sɛkɔnd 8 mu.
rightpanel_feature_langs_body: Adwene wɔ Zulu, Xhosa, Swahili ne bebree ho
rightpanel_result_desc: Hwɛ wo nnua apɔmu tebea na di akwan a wɔkyerɛw wɔ ase yi.
rightpanel_tip_1: Fa fɔto wɔ sunsum hann mu ma ɛyɛ yiye
rightpanel_tip_2: Si akoma nnua a ɛwɔ haw anaa mmati so
rightpanel_tip_3: Hwɛ dɔnnwɛ biara sɛ nnua no regyina
rightpanel_tip_4: Kyekyere adwene no kyerɛ wo nnua ho ɔpɛnimfo
rightpanel_history_desc: Wo nhwɛso 20 a etwa no sie wɔ sɛnea ɛteɛ. Bɔ biara ho na hwɛ adwene no nyinaa.
rightpanel_history_auto_body: Nhwɛso biara sie wɔ wo mfonini so
rightpanel_history_limit_body: A etwa no yi wɔ otomatik
rightpanel_settings_desc: Hyɛ wo kasa ne wo pɛ. Nsiesiei no sie wɔ wo fon so sɛnea ɛteɛ.
rightpanel_supported_langs_sub: UI ne AI adwene a wɔkyerɛwe
